description_long: A single donut with a light pink glaze sits on a small white plate, accompanied by a white cup of coffee or tea. The donut appears to have a smooth, glossy icing with no visible toppings, and the plate is placed on a square, light gray marble tabletop. The tabletop is set against a blue brick wall, suggesting an urban café or street-side setting. The donut's glaze is evenly applied, giving it a polished and appetizing appearance. The overall scene is clean and minimalistic, with the focus on the donut and its immediate surroundings.
description: A pink-glazed donut on a white plate sits beside a white cup on a marble table against a blue brick wall. The donut is smooth and glossy, with no visible toppings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the marble table, with the donut and cup barely visible on top.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the donut on a white plate and a cup on the marble table, set against a blue brick wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the table with the donut and cup visible from the side.
description_view_3: View of the blue brick wall only, with the table and donut not visible.
attribute_icing_type: pink sugar glaze, smooth and glossy
attribute_placement_location: on a white plate atop a marble table
